title: Resolve PR #164 CodeQL findings after develop drift

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting implementation: branch from latest develop, resolve CodeQL findings on PR #164, run targeted validation, open follow-up PR to develop.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Applied CodeQL follow-up fixes from PR #164 comments in dashboard/components/ui/conversation-viewer.tsx: removed unused useCallback import and simplified unreachable isAuthUnavailable condition in selectedSessionMissing button disabled state. Local lint tooling is currently broken/hanging in this environment (next lint flag mismatch and eslint config crash), so validation is change-scope review plus minimal diff.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Opened follow-up PR to develop for CodeQL fixes and review freshness: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/165

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Investigated CI failure on PR #164 (Actions job 71329262238). Root cause: conversation-viewer-streaming-updates tests assumed eager list rendering, but ConversationViewer now uses react-virtuoso virtualization. Added deterministic react-virtuoso test mock in conversation-viewer-streaming-updates.test.tsx so message rows render in JSDOM; targeted test now passes (5/5).

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Pushed follow-up commit d5852b7a to PR #165 to fix CI unit test regression from virtualization in conversation viewer streaming tests. Verified with dashboard ci:unit: 51 suites / 418 tests passing.
